title: build a full-stack todo app with a Flask REST API in backend…
current_goal: Provide instructions on how to run the full-stack todo app (Flask API and JS frontend)

current_plan.description: A full-stack ToDo list application allowing users to create, read, update, and delete tasks.
current_plan.architecture: Client-Server architecture using a REST API. The Flask backend interacts with an SQLite database, and the vanilla JavaScript frontend consumes the API endpoints.

files.purpose: Stores application configuration variables, specifically the database URI.
Defines the SQLAlchemy database model for the 'Todo' item.
The main Flask application file. Initializes the app, sets up the database, and defines all REST API routes (CRUD operations).
The main HTML structure for the ToDo application, linking CSS and JavaScript.
Handles all frontend logic: fetching tasks from the API, rendering them, and sending new task data.

build_steps: Initialize virtual environment and install dependencies.
Implement Flask API endpoints for CRUD operations.
Develop the vanilla JS frontend to interact with the API.

subtasks.name: Setup Configuration and Database Models
subtasks.description: Create the settings file and define the database schema.

files.purpose: Define the Todo model with fields like id, title, and completed status.

subtasks.name: Develop Flask REST API Backend
subtasks.description: Initialize the Flask app and implement the CRUD endpoints.

files.purpose: Initialize Flask, connect to the DB, and define routes: GET /todos (list), POST /todos (create), PUT /todos/<id> (update), DELETE /todos/<id> (delete).

subtasks.name: Build Frontend Structure and Logic
subtasks.description: Create the basic HTML layout and the JavaScript logic to handle user interactions.

files.purpose: Set up the basic page structure, including an input form and a container for the todo list.
Implement functions to fetch tasks on load, render tasks dynamically, and handle form submission/deletion events by calling the Flask API.

subtasks.name: Integration and Testing
subtasks.description: Ensure the frontend correctly communicates with the backend API endpoints.
